issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with activation type 'Main' (cost specification missing from DSL structure)
Condition is incomplete. Must check: (1) Leader has {Animal Kingdom Pirates} type, (2) you have 10 DON!! on field. Current condition only says 'Always'
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'trash this Character' (trash self, not from hand). Should be 'Trash' or similar self-reference action
excludeSelf:true contradicts card text. Effect should trash the card itself (not exclude self)
Structure uses 'thenActions' but conditions for playing must be met before/during action resolution. The DON count and Leader type must be checked before action execution, not after trash
